title: phalangium revolutum
intro: Phalangium revolutum, also known as the Cuckoo Flower or Lady's Slipper Orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to Europe and Western Asia and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, due to its high levels of flavonoids and alkaloids. Herbal preparations of Phalangium revolutum, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
